steps.t: The boar was last rumoured to be in the wooded hills to the east of Aldburg. Arcil has asked that you follow the tales of a great boar, not unlike the…
The trail continues east into the woods. You should follow the trail of the great boar.
The trail continues south into the woods. You should follow the trail of the great boar.
You saw the silhouette of what appears to be an enormous boar nearby and should approach with caution.
Arcil is in the Mead Hall of Aldburg, west of the woods. You should return to Arcil and let him know what you found in the woods.
